failedAssertions.reason: The Settings page cannot list built-in scan directories because the isolated startup database never seeds any rows into `scan_directories`; the saved settings-route evidence shows no built-in directory rows.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The native Tauri window could be captured but not foregrounded or clicked in this session, so the sidebar import control could not be activated on the real user surface.
Blocked before the Add Directory dialog could be opened because the native Settings window never became foreground-interactive in this session.
Blocked before the Add Platform and install journey could be driven because the native Settings window never became foreground-interactive in this session.

Direct route captures showed Central Skills and Settings rendering, but actual sidebar/back-navigation interactions could not be exercised because the native Tauri window never became foreground-interactive in this session.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that some sessions keep the Tauri window on-screen but non-frontmost, preventing AX/CGEvent interaction and forcing screenshot+OCR fallback for non-interactive evidence only.
